Title: Create a new User
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Call the constructor Utente() with the provided data.
2. Verify that the id is set to 1.
3. Verify that the password is set to "password123".
4. Verify that the email is set to "user@example.com".
5. Verify that the name is set to "John".
6. Verify that the surname is set to "Doe".
Expected Result: All attributes should be correctly initialized.

Title: Update User's Name
Preconditions: A user object has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Call the method setNome("Jane") on the user object.
2. Verify that the name is updated to "Jane".
Expected Result: The name should be successfully updated.

Title: Update User's Surname
Preconditions: A user object has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Call the method setCognome("Smith") on the user object.
2. Verify that the surname is updated to "Smith".
Expected Result: The surname should be successfully updated.

Title: Create a new Product
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- Name: "Laptop"
- Location: "Rome"
- Description: "High-performance laptop"
- Image: "laptop.jpg"
- Price: 1200.00
- Owner: User with id 1
Test Steps:
1. Call the constructor Prodotto() with the provided data.
2. Verify that the name is set to "Laptop".
3. Verify that the location is set to "Rome".
4. Verify that the description is set to "High-performance laptop".
5. Verify that the image is set to "laptop.jpg".
6. Verify that the price is set to 1200.00.
7. Verify that the owner is set to the user with id 1.
Expected Result: All attributes should be correctly initialized.

Title: Create a new Report
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- Type: True
- Title: "Fraudulent Product"
- Description: "The product is fake."
- Reported User: User with id 2
- Author: User with id 1
Test Steps:
1. Call the constructor Segnalazione() with the provided data.
2. Verify that the type is set to True.
3. Verify that the title is set to "Fraudulent Product".
4. Verify that the description is set to "The product is fake."
5. Verify that the reported user is set to the user with id 2.
6. Verify that the author is set to the user with id 1.
Expected Result: All attributes should be correctly initialized.

Title: Update Report's Type
Preconditions: A report object has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Call the method setTipo(False) on the report object.
2. Verify that the type is updated to False.
Expected Result: The type should be successfully updated.

Title: Update Report's Title
Preconditions: A report object has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Call the method setTitolo("Incorrect Product Information") on the report object.
2. Verify that the title is updated to "Incorrect Product Information".
Expected Result: The title should be successfully updated.

Title: Update Report's Description
Preconditions: A report object has been created.
Test Data: - New description: "The product information is incorrect."
Test Steps:
1. Call the method setDescrizione("The product information is incorrect.") on the report object.
2. Verify that the description is updated to "The product information is incorrect.".
Expected Result: The description should be successfully updated.

Title: Update Report's Reported User
Preconditions: A report object has been created.
Test Data: - New reported user: User with id 3
Test Steps:
1. Call the method setUtenteSegnalato(User with id 3) on the report object.
2. Verify that the reported user is updated to the user with id 3.
Expected Result: The reported user should be successfully updated.

Title: Update Report's Author
Preconditions: A report object has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Call the method setAutore(User with id 4) on the report object.
2. Verify that the author is updated to the user with id 4.
Expected Result: The author should be successfully updated.

Title: Associate a User with a Product
Preconditions: A user and a product have been created.
Test Data:
- User: User with id 1
- Product: Product with id 1
Test Steps:
1. Set the owner of the product to the user with id 1 using the method setProprietario(User with id 1).
2. Verify that the owner of the product is set to the user with id 1.
Expected Result: The product's owner should be successfully updated to the user.

Title: Associate a User with a Report as Reported User
Preconditions: A user and a report have been created.
Test Data:
- User: User with id 2
- Report: Report with id 1
Test Steps:
1. Set the reported user of the report to the user with id 2 using the method setUtenteSegnalato(User with id 2).
2. Verify that the reported user of the report is set to the user with id 2.
Expected Result: The report's reported user should be successfully updated to the user.

Title: Associate a User with a Report as Author
Preconditions: A user and a report have been created.
Test Data:
- User: User with id 1
- Report: Report with id 1
Test Steps:
1. Set the author of the report to the user with id 1 using the method setAutore(User with id 1).
2. Verify that the author of the report is set to the user with id 1.
Expected Result: The report's author should be successfully updated to the user.

Title: Invalid User ID
Preconditions: A user object has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to call the method getid(-1) on the user object.
2. Verify that an exception is thrown or the method returns an invalid value.
Expected Result: An exception should be thrown or the method should return an invalid value.

Title: Invalid Product Price
Preconditions: A product object has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to call the method setPrezzo(-100.00) on the product object.
2. Verify that an exception is thrown or the method returns an invalid value.
Expected Result: An exception should be thrown or the method should return an invalid value.

Title: Invalid Report Type
Preconditions: A report object has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to call the method setTipo("string") on the report object.
2. Verify that an exception is thrown or the method returns an invalid value.
Expected Result: An exception should be thrown or the method should return an invalid value.

Title: Maximum Length for User Name
Preconditions: A user object has been created.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to call the method setNome("a" * 51) on the user object.
2. Verify that the name is truncated to the maximum allowed length.
Expected Result: The name should be truncated to the maximum allowed length.
